texto: We'll have a public power authority, which will also have the ability to build power or finance power. And more importantly, we'll have more power than our economy provides. All of that will give us leverage we don't have today.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Gray Davis sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “We'll have a public power authority, which will also have the ability to build power or finance p…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, today, power, útil em momentos de power e economy.
